CVE-2021-43519.title: Stack overflow in lua_resume of ldo.c in Lua Interpreter 5.1.0~5. ...
CVE-2021-43519.description: Stack overflow in lua_resume of ldo.c in Lua Interpreter 5.1.0~5.4.4 allows attackers to perform a Denial of Service via a crafted script file.

CVE-2022-24106.title: In Xpdf prior to 4.04, the DCT (JPEG) decoder was incorrectly all ...
CVE-2022-24106.description: In Xpdf prior to 4.04, the DCT (JPEG) decoder was incorrectly allowing the 'interleaved' flag to be changed after the first scan of the image, leading to an unknown integer-related vulnerability in Stream.cc.

CVE-2022-24107.title: Xpdf prior to 4.04 lacked an integer overflow check in JPXStream. ...
CVE-2022-24107.description: Xpdf prior to 4.04 lacked an integer overflow check in JPXStream.cc.

CVE-2022-36561.title: XPDF v4.0.4 was discovered to contain a segmentation violation vi ...
CVE-2022-36561.description: XPDF v4.0.4 was discovered to contain a segmentation violation via the component /xpdf/AcroForm.cc:538.

CVE-2022-38784.title: Poppler prior to and including 22.08.0 contains an integer overfl ...
CVE-2022-38784.description: Poppler prior to and including 22.08.0 contains an integer overflow in the JBIG2 decoder (JBIG2Stream::readTextRegionSeg() in JBIGStream.cc). Processing a specially crafted PDF file or JBIG2 image could lead to a crash or the execution of arbitrary code. This is similar to the vulnerability described by CVE-2022-38171 in Xpdf.

CVE-2023-43281.title: Double Free vulnerability in Nothings Stb Image.h v.2.28 allows a ...
CVE-2023-43281.description: Double Free vulnerability in Nothings Stb Image.h v.2.28 allows a remote attacker to cause a denial of service via a crafted file to the stbi_load_gif_main function.
